mano_cua.result_summary: 清除按钮(✕)在DOM中存在(div.vhd__datepicker__clear-button)但视觉上不可见。内含加载正常(naturalWidth:150)，但CSS规则.vhd__datepicker__clear-button svg针对SVG元素而非img元素，导致图标定位/尺寸样式未生效。此外fullview模式下按钮被display:none隐藏。用户选择日期后看不到清除按钮，无法清除已选日期。
mano_cua.last_reasoning: Clear button exists in DOM at correct position (x:659,y:283,w:40,h:48) with valid SVG resource loaded, but NOT visually visible. CSS mismatch: styles target svg element but DOM uses img element.

deploy_notes.workaround: Fixed SCSS calc unit error: calc(50% - 1.1875) → calc(50% - 1.1875em)
